task_completion.description: Load AAPL and MSFT daily data in NinjaTrader
task_completion.visual_evidence: NinjaTrader interface shows charts or data series for both AAPL and MSFT set to a Daily timeframe.
A Correlation indicator is visible on the chart or in the indicators list, with its period parameter set to 20.

task_completion.description: Identify the correlation value for December 31, 2024
task_completion.visual_evidence: The chart crosshair, cursor, or Data Box is hovering over or selecting the December 31, 2024 candle, displaying the calculated correlation value.

task_completion.description: Open or create the correlation_report.txt file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (like Notepad) is open showing the file 'correlation_report.txt' located in 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\NinjaTraderTasks'.

task_completion.description: Record the calculated numeric value in the report
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file contains only a numeric value (which should be approximately -0.1701, not 0.42).
The 'Save Workspace' dialog is open, or the NinjaTrader menu shows the workspace being saved.

integrity.description: Agent used the NinjaTrader GUI to calculate the correlation
integrity.visual_evidence: NinjaTrader application is actively used to plot the chart and indicator, rather than a terminal window running a Python script to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Agent did not copy-paste the incorrect metadata ground truth
integrity.visual_evidence: The value recorded in the text file is not 0.42 (which is a known incorrect value from the metadata).

integrity.description: The report file is saved in the correct directory
integrity.visual_evidence: The text editor title bar or file explorer confirms the file is saved at 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\NinjaTraderTasks\correlation_report.txt', not just an unsaved 'Untitled' document.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct 20-period Pearson correlation between AAPL and MSFT ending on December 31, 2024, is -0.1701. The previously claimed ground truth of 0.42 is incorrect. The VLM should verify that the agent recorded a value close to -0.1701 in the final report. The required instruments are AAPL and MSFT, and the required indicator is Correlation.
